name: DW · CRM Opportunity
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS opportunity_id,
    'OPP-' || lpad(gs::text, 6, '0')                                           AS opportunity_code,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('OPLEAD'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 3000)    AS lead_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('OPCUST'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 2000)    AS customer_id,
    1 + (('x'||substr(md5('OPEMP'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 300)      AS owner_employee_id,
    (ARRAY['Prospecting','Qualification','Proposal','Negotiation','Closed Won','Closed Lost'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('OPSTAGE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 6)] AS stage,
    round((( ('x'||substr(md5('OPAMT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 25000000)/100.0 + 500)::numeric, 2) AS amount,
    (('x'||substr(md5('OPPROB'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 100)         AS win_probability,
    (CURRENT_DATE - (('x'||substr(md5('OPCREATE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 540)::int) AS created_date,
    (CURRENT_DATE + (('x'||substr(md5('OPCLOSE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 120)::int) AS expected_close_date
FROM generate_series(1, 2000) AS gs
